title: Anthodon laevigatum
taxonomy: Anthodon laevigatum is classified as a type of extinct plant, specifically an early lycopod. It belongs to the genus Anthodon, which is part of the class Lycopodiopsida. Lycopodiopsida is a division of vascular plants that also includes club mosses and related species. The classification of Anthodon laevigatum reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history. As a member of the Lycopodiopsida division, Anthodon laevigatum is considered a significant part of the plant kingdom's ancient diversity.
